title: 宝塚記念の後に・革命に散る！

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The king, felled by the princess's blade! Oh, the
power of a revolution! However, it is not enough
to defeat me!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I turn to my potential eternal adversary and say,
"Steel yourself and stand tall as my nemesis!" Such
words could be given to myself as well.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Look around at what my feats have produced—a
horde of enemies threatening to hinder my true
stride. Lo! A challenge worthy of a king if I've
ever seen one!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Now is the time to press forward and build a
dynasty. My nation will witness its foundation at
the Japan Cup!
